parallel_materialization.claim_boundary: Parallel materialization uses recording-sharded D2E extraction parts; prior-action state is local to each recording shard.

canonical_materialization.claim_boundary: Canonical monoliths are audit/repro artifacts; sharded paths are the training and streaming-eval inputs.

prior_action_context.claim_boundary: Offline FDM evaluation is teacher-forced on previous actions only; closed-loop stability remains a separate G008 live-suite requirement.
